narrative:
Precinct Brown Twp & Ansonia Village (precinct in Darke County) has 1,231 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
